query: SELECT u.id, u.name, COUNT(cm.id) as message_count, MAX(cm.createdAt) as latest_message, MIN(cm.createdAt) as oldest_message FROM users u LEFT JOIN chatMessages cm ON cm.userId = u.id GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY u.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MfKkRv4BtcjpAV.27131ce48b0a --database nkB3BF7vCNJASAUzbYZAhY --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, COUNT(cm.id) as message_count, MAX(cm.createdAt) as latest_message, MIN(cm.createdAt) as oldest_message FROM users u LEFT JOIN chatMessages cm ON cm.userId = u.id GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY u.id;
